results.notes: B3/B4 generation. Quattro models share same specs.
B4 generation. Last year for 80 in US.
Same platform as 80. Sport variant available.
Final year for 100. Becomes A6 in 1995.
First year B5 A4 in US. Offset range 35-45mm.
First year for A6 (replaced 100). C4 platform.
D2 platform. Note larger hub bore (66.6mm) vs other Audis.
B4 platform. Last year for Coupe in US.
Final year. Limited US market availability.
Final year for C4 S4. Becomes S6 in 1995.
First year S6. Replaces S4 name for C4 platform.
Final year. Replaced by A8 in 1997.
964 Carrera 2/4. Staggered setup standard. Turbo has wider wheels.
993 Carrera. Staggered setup standard. 16" or 17" options.
993 Carrera/Turbo. Wide variety of wheel packages.
Grand tourer. S4 (315hp) and GT (326hp) variants.
S2 and Turbo only for 1990. Cookie cutters or Club Sport wheels.
First 968 year. Successor to 944. Club Sport available.

notes: Audi 80/90/Coupe/Cabriolet use 4x108 bolt pattern with 57.1mm hub bore
Audi 100/200/A4/A6/A8/S4/S6/V8 use 5x112 bolt pattern with 57.1mm hub bore (A8 uses 66.6mm)
All 1990s Porsches use 5x130 bolt pattern with 71.6mm hub bore
All Porsche sports cars (911/928/944/968/Boxster) are staggered (wider rear)
